temporal_description: A medium shot captures a man and a woman in a cozy, purple-walled living room. The man, wearing a blue long-sleeved shirt and light-colored pants, is lounging on a patterned armchair, looking up at the woman with a slightly stressed expression. He has one hand on his head. The woman, dressed in a white button-up shirt and jeans, stands over him, pointing a finger at him as if making a point. She is holding a black suitcase. The room is filled with furniture, including a window with patterned curtains, a side table, and a coffee table with bags on it. The audio features a woman speaking with an excited and slightly breathless tone, her voice filled with cheerful anticipation. She exclaims, "Your suitcase. We're going to Las Vegas." The camera cuts to a medium close-up of the woman. She is now smiling warmly, looking off-camera. Behind her, a large, framed poster with the word "Jouets" in red is visible on the purple wall, along with a vase of yellow flowers. The shot is static, focusing on her pleasant expression. There is no background music or other sound effects, placing all the focus on her enthusiastic announcement.
